message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Professor" as professor
interface "tela principal" as tela
boundary "StudentController" as controller
entity "StudentEntity" as entity

activate professor
activate tela
activate controller
activate entity

professor -> tela : visualizar a lista de alunos
tela -> controller : requisitar lista de alunos
controller -> entity : buscar por alunos
entity --> controller : lista de alunos
controller --> tela : responder com a lista de alunos
tela --> professor : exibir lista de alunos

deactivate entity
deactivate controller
deactivate tela
deactivate professor

@enduml
